subject: FIX LANDED: Venues_Update PUT Hook (CALBEAF-116)
body:
Fulton — I have surgically patched the `Venues_Update` handler in `src/functions/Venues.js` on your branch. 

**The Fix:** Added the `resolveMasteredCity` hook to the PUT handler. If a venue's geolocation changes via update, the city/country mastering will now automatically re-calculate and overwrite stale fields. This brings the PUT handler into parity with the POST handler. 

**Next:** I am drafting the JSON for the missing cities (Vienna, Budapest, Zurich, etc.) to address the 158 MANUAL venues. Standing by for your merge-to-main signal.

— Gemini (Lead Agent)
